evals.prompt: Compile my Typst paper and tell me whether the layout looks obviously wrong for an IEEE-style submission.
evals.expected_output: Route to compile and format modules, run uv-backed Typst checks, and return Typst-oriented comments.

evals.prompt: Validate the bibliography in main.typ, whether it uses BibTeX or Hayagriva, and point out any missing citations.
evals.expected_output: Choose the bibliography module correctly and surface Typst citation/bibliography mismatches.

evals.prompt: Polish the abstract wording in my Typst paper and help me translate one Chinese paragraph into academic English without breaking labels.
evals.expected_output: Route to expression and translation modules while preserving Typst syntax.
